title: Flour Pancake Stack
description: A simple stack of fluffy pancakes made with flour and a hint of bitter taste. Serve warm and enjoy!

ingredients.name: bitter
ingredients.notes: add a hint of bitter to balance the sweetness

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, pancake mix, and bitter.
Add water and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Stack the pancakes high and serve with your favorite toppings.
